title: hieracium senex
intro: Hieracium senex, also known as old man's feather cap or hoary hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium senex include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium senex typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to affected areas.
